extension.description: EasyMovie helps you pick movies for movie night. Answer a few questions (genre, rating, runtime) and get a curated random selection from your library. Supports movie set awareness, multiple viewing modes, and playlist generation.
extension.news:
v1.3.2 (2026-07-08) - Improved reliability of the skin-adaptive dialog fonts behind the scenes - Faster reopening of dialogs when the skin has not changed - Hardened font generation against rare crashes and concurrent updates - No changes to how EasyMovie looks or works day to day
v1.3.1 (2026-07-05) - Fixed the top edge of the highlighted cast member's frame being cut off in the movie info screen
v1.3.0 (2026-07-05) - The movie info screen (opened from Browse Mode) is now built right into EasyMovie, with a large poster, cast photos, plot, and details like year, rating, runtime, certification, and genres - This fixes a problem where the info screen could appear blank on some Kodi skins; it now displays correctly on every skin - Playing a movie from the info screen still remembers it for resume and in-progress tracking, just like before - Text in EasyMovie's windows now better matches your skin's style, so titles and headings stay clearly bigger than the regular text instead of shrinking down on some skins
